mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, author_id, author_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, private_num, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM private_counseling ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
SELECT id, title, content, author_id, author_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, private_num, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM private_counseling WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO private_counseling (title, content, author_id, author_name, phone, counsel_type, comment_count, private_num, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{phone}, #{counselType}, 0, #{privateNum}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE private_counseling SET comment_count = #{commentCount}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE private_counseling SET private_num = #{privateNum}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
